claim: For 65536 fixed segments of length 256 on AMD Radeon RX 9070 XT gfx1201, the LDS-backed block inclusive scan measured 14.667770x faster than the one-thread-per-segment baseline using HIP-event timing only.
expected_profiler_signals: more parallel work within each segment
higher effective read plus write bandwidth
LDS traffic replacing per-thread serial scans
curation_note: timing-only fixed-segment scan record: HIP-event timings and CPU-reference correctness passed, but rocprofiler/rocprof counters were not collected because rocprof, rocprofv3, rocminfo, and rocm-smi were unavailable in this Windows venv environment.
